---
applyTo: "**/*.cpp,**/*.hpp,**/*.py"
---
# Copyright headers

## C++ headers and sources

Start with a Doxygen file block:

```cpp
/**
 * @file relative/path.hpp
 * @brief One-line summary.
 * @copyright Copyright (c) YYYY Boyle Development Team
 */
```

Use the current year or the year of original authorship per team policy.

## Python

```python
# Copyright (c) YYYY Boyle Development Team. All rights reserved.
```

## License

The project uses the **BSD 3-Clause** license; do not paste the full license into every file unless maintainers request it.
